title: Convergence loop vector smoke linkage and budget telemetry
acceptance: Allow opt-in convergence-loop manifests to feed the existing vector exporter in smoke namespace only; production namespace promotion remains blocked by SANGUO-RAGOPS-0501 checklist gates.
Emit vector record budget telemetry from convergence-loop rehearsal outputs so feedback proposals can recommend budget/policy adjustments instead of requiring manual number edits.
Reject raw seeds and ungrounded pages from vector export; only retrieval-ready anchor passages and evidence cards may be exported under the existing schema.
All provider namespace, batch size, quota, and record budget decisions must come from policy or environment, not hardcoded runner values.
deliverables: feedback proposal coverage for vector budgets
notes: 2026-05-21 | 狀態: open | 驗證: pending | 變更: opened vector smoke linkage card for convergence-loop opt-in manifests | 阻塞: SANGUO-RAGOPS-0603 manifest integration
